---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 💡 Motivation
Explain why this feature would be useful. What problem does it solve?

## 🎯 Use Cases
Describe specific use cases where this feature would be beneficial:

1. **Use Case 1**: [Description]
2. **Use Case 2**: [Description]
3. **Use Case 3**: [Description]

## 📋 Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution in detail:

### API Design
```typescript
// Example of how the API might look
interface NewFeature {
  method(): void;
  property: string;
}
```

### Implementation Details
- [ ] Core engine changes
- [ ] API changes
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Performance considerations

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe alternative solutions you've considered:

1. **Alternative 1**: [Description and why it was rejected]
2. **Alternative 2**: [Description and why it was rejected]

## 📊 Impact Assessment
### Performance Impact
- [ ] No impact
- [ ] Minor impact
- [ ] Significant impact
- [ ] Needs benchmarking

### Breaking Changes
- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Minor breaking changes
- [ ] Major breaking changes

### Compatibility
- [ ] Web: [Yes/No/Partial]
- [ ] Desktop: [Yes/No/Partial]
- [ ] Mobile: [Yes/No/Partial]
- [ ] Console: [Yes/No/Partial]
- [ ] VR/AR: [Yes/No/Partial]

## 📚 Documentation Requirements
What documentation would need to be created or updated:

- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Getting started guide
- [ ] Tutorials
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Migration guide

## 🧪 Testing Requirements
What tests would need to be created:

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Performance tests
- [ ] Browser tests
- [ ] Platform-specific tests

## 📈 Priority
How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - Blocker for my project
- [ ] High - Important for my use case
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 🤝 Contribution
Are you willing to help implement this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] Yes, but I need guidance
- [ ] No, I prefer the team to implement it

## 📅 Timeline
When would you need this feature?

- [ ] ASAP - Critical for current project
- [ ] Next release - Important for upcoming work
- [ ] Future release - Nice to have
- [ ] No specific timeline

## 📎 Additional Resources
Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## 🔗 Related Issues
List any related issues or discussions:

- Issue #[number]: [Title]
- PR #[number]: [Title]
- Discussion: [Link]

## ✅ Checklist
Please confirm the following:

- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing users
- [ ] I have thought about the implementation complexity
- [ ] I have provided enough detail for the team to evaluate the request
